title: citrus × aurantium f. natsudaidai
intro: Citrus × aurantium f. natsudaidai is a hybrid citrus plant, specifically a sour orange (Citrus × aurantium) cultivar, native to Japan and Taiwan. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system due to its high concentration of limonoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Citrus × aurantium f. natsudaidai include its potential to aid in weight loss, lower cholesterol levels, and reduce stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
